Low Meaning: Lower curiosity toward food exploration and nutrition learning.
Medium Meaning: Moderate food curiosity; selective interest in trying or learning.
High Meaning: High curiosity toward food exploration, healthy-food novelty, and nutrition learning.

Low Meaning: Lower interest in exploring new ways to stay active.
Medium Meaning: Moderate interest in new movement options.
High Meaning: High interest in exploring different forms of movement and activity.

Low Meaning: Lower curiosity about recovery methods or recovery learning.
Medium Meaning: Moderate recovery curiosity; may explore selectively.
High Meaning: High curiosity about recovery approaches and ways to recharge.

Low Meaning: Lower interest in reflection, mindfulness, or self-awareness practices.
Medium Meaning: Moderate interest in mind-body practices.
High Meaning: High interest in reflection, mindfulness, and mental wellness exploration.

Low Meaning: Lower tendency to learn before making wellness choices.
Medium Meaning: Moderate learning orientation; may seek information when needed.
High Meaning: High tendency to learn, compare, and understand before wellness decisions.

Low Meaning: Lower willingness to change wellness habits or approaches.
Medium Meaning: Moderate adaptability; may change when benefits are clear.
High Meaning: High flexibility and willingness to update wellness habits.

Low Meaning: Lower planning around food decisions.
Medium Meaning: Moderate meal planning; may plan when convenient.
High Meaning: High tendency to plan food choices ahead.

Low Meaning: Lower follow-through on physical activity intentions.
Medium Meaning: Moderate follow-through; consistency may depend on circumstances.
High Meaning: High tendency to follow through on activity plans.

Low Meaning: Lower tendency to maintain steady sleep routines.
Medium Meaning: Moderate sleep routine consistency.
High Meaning: High tendency to maintain and protect sleep routines.

Low Meaning: Lower tendency to monitor wellness progress.
Medium Meaning: Moderate interest in checking progress.
High Meaning: High tendency to track, review, and monitor wellness improvement.

Low Meaning: Lower ability to pause before short-term choices.
Medium Meaning: Moderate impulse control; varies by situation.
High Meaning: High ability to pause, think, and make intentional wellness choices.

Low Meaning: Lower tendency to act on recovery needs.
Medium Meaning: Moderate recovery discipline; may rest when signals are obvious.
High Meaning: High tendency to respect rest, recovery, and fatigue signals.

Low Meaning: Lower preference for being active with others.
Medium Meaning: Moderate social activity preference.
High Meaning: High preference for physical activity with others.

Low Meaning: Lower tendency to discuss or share wellness interests.
Medium Meaning: Moderate wellness sharing; shares selectively.
High Meaning: High tendency to talk about and share wellness ideas.

Low Meaning: Lower motivation from challenge or comparison.
Medium Meaning: Moderate response to healthy competition.
High Meaning: High motivation from friendly competition, challenge, or comparison.

Low Meaning: Lower natural drive toward movement or stimulation.
Medium Meaning: Moderate activity energy.
High Meaning: High natural energy, movement-seeking, and activity drive.

Low Meaning: Lower preference for shared relaxation or recovery activities.
Medium Meaning: Moderate preference for group-based recovery.
High Meaning: High preference for relaxing or recovering through shared activities.

Low Meaning: Lower outward enthusiasm or influence around wellness.
Medium Meaning: Moderate tendency to encourage or influence others.
High Meaning: High outward wellness enthusiasm and positive influence on others.

Low Meaning: Lower tendency to consider others' food preferences.
Medium Meaning: Moderate consideration of others in food choices.
High Meaning: High consideration and accommodation of others' food needs.

Low Meaning: Lower preference for respectful, low-conflict wellness discussions.
Medium Meaning: Moderate harmony orientation.
High Meaning: High preference for respectful, cooperative wellness discussions.

Low Meaning: Lower tendency to encourage others' wellness efforts.
Medium Meaning: Moderate supportiveness.
High Meaning: High tendency to encourage and celebrate others' wellness progress.

Low Meaning: Lower receptiveness to helpful advice or feedback.
Medium Meaning: Moderate receptiveness to guidance.
High Meaning: High openness to trusted guidance and constructive feedback.

Low Meaning: Lower tendency to adjust or cooperate in shared wellness activities.
Medium Meaning: Moderate cooperative participation.
High Meaning: High willingness to cooperate and adapt when working with others.

Low Meaning: Lower awareness of others' rest and recovery needs.
Medium Meaning: Moderate respect for shared recovery needs.
High Meaning: High respect for others' quiet, rest, and recovery needs.

Low Meaning: Low tendency to worry about body changes or health signals.
Medium Meaning: Moderate health worry or reassurance seeking.
High Meaning: High sensitivity to body changes, health concerns, or reassurance needs.

Low Meaning: Low tendency for emotions to affect eating choices.
Medium Meaning: Moderate emotion-driven eating response.
High Meaning: High tendency for emotions to affect eating amount or food choices.

Low Meaning: Low tendency for stress to disrupt wellness routines.
Medium Meaning: Moderate stress-related disruption.
High Meaning: High tendency for stress or pressure to disrupt wellness consistency.

Low Meaning: Low tendency for worry or mental load to affect sleep.
Medium Meaning: Moderate night-time mental load.
High Meaning: High tendency for thoughts, worry, or mental load to disrupt sleep.

Low Meaning: Low all-or-nothing swings; more stable wellness patterns.
Medium Meaning: Moderate wellness stability; some swings after disruption.
High Meaning: High tendency toward all-or-nothing patterns or routine instability.

Low Meaning: Low difficulty recovering emotionally from wellness setbacks.
Medium Meaning: Moderate emotional recovery difficulty after setbacks.
High Meaning: High self-criticism or slow emotional recovery after wellness setbacks.
